accessNotes.en: I Deti vrisketai sto Kato Koufonisi. Gia episkepti apo to Pano Koufonisi i prosvasi xekina me karavaki kai synechizei me syntomo perpatima konta ston palio oikismo.
accessNotes.gr: Η Δέτη βρίσκεται στο Κάτω Κουφονήσι. Για επισκέπτη από το Πάνω Κουφονήσι η πρόσβαση ξεκινά με καραβάκι και συνεχίζει με σύντομο περπάτημα κοντά στον παλιό οικισμό.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Koufonisia pass 2026-05-28: koufonisia.gr describes Deti as a small sandy beach very close to the old settlement on Kato Koufonisi, east of Deti. Corrected the old Naxos wording; confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Koufonisia official evidence pass 2026-06-02: koufonisia.gr and the Small Cyclades municipal guide support Deti as a small Kato Koufonisi beach near the old settlement/tavern area. Access was corrected to boat_only for app purposes because Kato Koufonisi beaches are reached from Ano Koufonisi by boat before walking locally. No windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Popular source upgrade 2026-06-02: Beaches-Searcher directly supports Leonidas Beach identity on Kato Koufonisi, boat-only/water access, pebbly/rocky terrain, moderate depth, no amenities, and snorkeling context.
Visit Koufonisia supports the Kato Koufonisi boat-access context from Pano Koufonisi for beaches on the island; Roaming Stones independently lists Leonidas Beach among Kato Koufonisi beaches.

Access remains boat_only so this beach should not be treated as an easy-access ideal recommendation while practical alternatives exist. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live-condition claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Koufonisia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 229796834 names this exact Pano Koufonisi feature as Limni beach. Exploring Greece describes Limni as the first small beach east of Geitonia tis Eirinis, a small coastline indentation with pebbles and rocky seabed; a travel account and nearby accommodation listing also distinguish Limni from adjacent Porta.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: OSM names the exact Pano Koufonisi feature as Limni beach, and Exploring Greece directly places Limni on the seaside trail east of Geitonia tis Eirinis, describing a small coastline indentation with pebbles and rocky seabed plus road/path access. Existing medium-depth/no-organization metadata remains conservative. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

Navigation audit 2026-06-12 (batch-approved): pin moved 121 m onto the same-name OSM beach feature (https://www.openstreetmap.org/way/70321971, "Πόρι", OSM data 2026-06-11) because the previous pin sat outside the mapped beach polygon. Previous pin: 36.94487,25.6219. Only coordinates changed; windProfile, amenities and claims untouched. Final pin refined onto the feature outline itself (36.945674,25.620799) because the thin beach polygon's centroid falls outside the ring.

waterDepth.notes: Η πηγή δίνει κανονικό βάθος, με βότσαλα και βράχια στον βυθό.

metadata.sourceNotes: Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Kato Koufonisi Fykio promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing Exploring Greece direct beach-source coverage and Koufonisia.net support identity/location plus moderate path access, small-pebble/rock beach and seabed, normal-depth context and secluded/unorganized status. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

googleMapsNavigation.reason: name-collision risk (no polygon evidence): exact "fykio" on Koufonisia+Schinoussa
